title: borkonstia
side_effects: Borkonstia can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions in some individuals, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use of the plant can also lead to stomach issues like nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In rare cases, excessive consumption of borkonstia can cause cardiac problems, including irregular heartbeats, palpitations, and even heart failure. Furthermore, improper preparation and consumption of borkonstia can also interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
